TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Cencu, title = Cencu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cencu} }

S.FORM: == CencuËóèÊóè == Cencu tada sakaudip nuhein itida i Cincen buyuan, u Cenyi a kamu nu binacadan, saan tu kunuheni " puopa" Cenyi ýΩñýΩºýΩëýºãýΩîýºã, sumaden nu Wili misulit " bod pa, aasipen nu Cenyi P√∂ba. tadaangangan nika kenihan itida i Cunha-minkuo kunhekuo atu labutu nu kanatalan a Sicen, Cun, Cin, Kan, Din, kanatalay a tademaw makaala tu nemlisep a wangan ku tademaw, itida i Nipuoe, Intu', Pudan, Pacise-tan sa i liwliw nu Cincen buyuan a kanatalan idaw nikakenihan tu tademaw, duma satu idaw ku namaka Cunkuo kanatalan mabulaway nu Cencu atu iluc makaala tu tusep a wangan, u ihekalay a Cen-zen han. . pitu a seci, Suncen-kanpu palecaden tu Cincen buyuan, patideng tu Tulu-dikuo. kunyun caycay , caytu a seci, hamawsa malingatu ku Cencu a binacadan. Cencu nakamuan u Cenyi, milecad tu Cenwen. angangan nu kakawawan u sapahutin tu katala, sakayliwmah. Palutatengaan nuheni a lisin u mipaypaya, micidek ku sasinzaan nuheni. 7‰∏ñÁ¥Ä, . daduducan tu dikuc u Cencu a dikucan, u tengliw ku tatengaay. u tunuc ku kakanen, katalan atu sidi ku yadahay a nikanan, manamuh minanum tu suyuca, cinkuociw. papahutinan u dabek ku yadah, patiyamay han u nipatunduhan tu ba'tu ku luma'. pasayda han i tapukuwan ku tadem. pisiwgacuan u tada kanamuhan nu Cencu a demiadan. matenesay t uku lalangw nuheni, micidek ku balubaluan nu melitmelit, yadah ku nipaini nu taw, sasapayuen nu Cencu, kuyumi nu heni, lalalukiyawan, tanka, kimkimkiman nu tademaw nisangaan uyda ku picidekan. Sese, zekun nalimaan, papalawan caay kaw tatengaay a lalangawan nu laliwanan a nikilukan. . nananaman a sasalisinanÈ¢®‰øóÁøíÊÖ£ kakikunganÂ©öÂßª yadah ku wayway nu nipikikungan. Hanaadih kita tu cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna anikaleacawaan, itida i mawmahay nu niyadu'an atu nika lamelan tu dumaan a tademawan nu niyadu'an makaala tu siwlim a lasubuan. Sakaadihan numita u mikadabu ku tataynaan tu tatamaan. anu inai'ay nu tatamaan a wawaan taneng mikadabu tu tataynaan. . katuuday nu tatamaan a acawa nu lumaan, sipakayda i tatamaan a malekakaay ku acawaw, mikikun sat uku sakakaay a tatamaan, kilul sat uku sabama milabu tida lumaan, siwawa satu u sakakaay a kakaan ku wama han, saba hantu u biki tu ku sausi. nu tatusaay a malekakaay nu tatamaan cacay ku tataynaan a acawaw mihniay hina adih kita. Dumasa idaw ku calekakaan nu tatamaan tu acawawan atu cabay milabutu kasiacawa. . Cencu nikaleacawaan amisawantan tu putun nu idangan atu lalabu nu lumaan a mikikung, malecaday ku wama han acaay kaleacawaw, nu calekakaan acaay tu kaleacawaw. caysiw-walcay mihcaan, midui tu ku Sicen itidaay a dayhu tu Cunha-zenmin kunhekuo a kikungan nu hulic, saan ku hulic " lawpesentu ku cacaya nu yadahay a tataynaan a acawaw, cacaya a tatamaan a acawawan, nu malaacawaay tu a waywayan, anu caay lawpesi nida ku taleacawaaan, hidan tu sa. 1981Âπ¥, ". kanki nu binacadanÊ∞ëÊóèÈóú‰øÇ Cencu atu Cunyun hancu idaw ku sasupaini nuheni tu matenesay a lalangawan. Suncen-kapu zitay, Tencaw atu Tuhun malalitemuh tu Cenan Sinin Tankula pungkangan Naci Lasa a dadan. nikudan satu sakaudip nu Cenhan kapahtu ku nikasasungaayan nu heni atu lalangawan, Hancu a tawce, secuo, insua a nalimaan taydatu i Centi, Cencu pasayda i Hahti idaw tu ku yadahay nu cacacudadan. Cencu milakuuyd tu Cencu nipiduducan tu sapipaypaya a lisinan, ni kuwanan a liwliw nu binacadan a niyadu'an mapalalit, Yuncaw zitay a mikikakaay nu Mumku binacadan, mikikakaay tu Cincaw a Mancu, mikikaka tu Licen niyadu'an a Nasicu, miduduc tu sapalutatengaan a sinzaan, sakaudip, lisin, lalangawan caay namin kalacad ku nipaini tu sakatineng. . Cencu atu Cincen kawyun a Menpa binacadan, Lupa binacadan, Siaepa-zen a binacadan hatidaaytu nu tenes mapulung maudip, caay ka putun ku kalecabay nuheni. ci enem se ci Dalaycen-yinciacuo itidaay a nilecuhan i Menuo a Menpa a binacadan. Cencu u sapikiluk tu Cenyi a sulit nu Cenwen, alaen nu Pu'dan, Sicin a tademaw sipikiluk nuheni tu kamu. . itida i Kancincun- dencen kalalitemuhan a Cenli saliningan, idaw ku nikakenihan a malaliday nu Cencu a binacadan, u Cenyi nami ku sakamuen, itini i labu musakamuay tu kamuan, mahida u Ciazen-zen, Muya-zen sa, caaya kaw kakatenengananay a binacada, palu Cencu han namin nu Cunha-minkuo kunhekuo kina binacadan. .
S.PHON: == ¶…ôn ¶u** == ¶…ôn ¶u tada sakaudip nuƒß…ôin itida i ¶in ¶…ôn bujuan, u ¶…ônji a kamu nu bina ¶adan, saan tu kunuƒß…ôni " puopa" ¶…ônji ******, sumad…ôn nu wir~…æi misur~…æit " bod pa, aasip…ôn nu ¶…ônji p*ba. tadaa≈ãa≈ãan nika k…ôniƒßan itida i ¶unƒßa-minkuo kunƒß…ôkuo atu r~…æabutu nu kanatar~…æan a si ¶…ôn, ¶un, ¶in, kan, din, kanatar~…æaj a tad…ômaw makaar~…æa tu n…ômr~…æis…ôp a wa≈ãan ku tad…ômaw, itida i nipuo…ô, intu î~ °, pudan, pa ¶is…ô-tan sa i r~…æiwr~…æiw nu ¶in ¶…ôn bujuan a kanatar~…æan idaw nikak…ôniƒßan tu tad…ômaw, duma satu idaw ku namaka ¶unkuo kanatar~…æan mabur~…æawaj nu ¶…ôn ¶u atu ir~…æu ¶ makaar~…æa tu tus…ôp a wa≈ãan, u iƒß…ôkar~…æaj a ¶…ôn-z…ôn ƒßan. . pitu a s…ô ¶i, sun ¶…ôn-kanpu par~…æ…ô ¶ad…ôn tu ¶in ¶…ôn bujuan, patid…ô≈ã tu tur~…æu-dikuo. kunjun ¶aj ¶aj , ¶ajtu a s…ô ¶i, ƒßamawsa mar~…æi≈ãatu ku ¶…ôn ¶u a bina ¶adan. ¶…ôn ¶u nakamuan u ¶…ônji, mir~…æ…ô ¶ad tu ¶…ônw…ôn. a≈ãa≈ãan nu kakawawan u sapaƒßutin tu katar~…æa, sakajr~…æiwmaƒß. par~…æutat…ô≈ãaan nuƒß…ôni a r~…æisin u mipajpaja, mi ¶id…ôk ku sasinzaan nuƒß…ôni. ***, . dadudu ¶an tu diku ¶ u ¶…ôn ¶u a diku ¶an, u t…ô≈ãr~…æiw ku tat…ô≈ãaaj. u tunu ¶ ku kakan…ôn, katar~…æan atu sidi ku jadaƒßaj a nikanan, manamuƒß minanum tu suju ¶a, ¶inkuo ¶iw. papaƒßutinan u dab…ôk ku jadaƒß, patijamaj ƒßan u nipatunduƒßan tu ba î~ °tu ku r~…æuma î~ °. pasajda ƒßan i tapukuwan ku tad…ôm. pisiwga ¶uan u tada kanamuƒßan nu ¶…ôn ¶u a d…ômiadan. mat…ôn…ôsaj t uku r~…æar~…æa≈ãw nuƒß…ôni, mi ¶id…ôk ku bar~…æubar~…æuan nu m…ôr~…æitm…ôr~…æit, jadaƒß ku nipaini nu taw, sasapaju…ôn nu ¶…ôn ¶u, kujumi nu ƒß…ôni, r~…æar~…æar~…æukijawan, tanka, kimkimkiman nu tad…ômaw nisa≈ãaan ujda ku pi ¶id…ôkan. s…ôs…ô, z…ôkun nar~…æimaan, papar~…æawan ¶aaj kaw tat…ô≈ãaaj a r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan nu r~…æar~…æiwanan a nikir~…æukan. . nananaman a sasar~…æisinan**** kakiku≈ãan** jadaƒß ku wajwaj nu nipikiku≈ãan. ƒßanaadiƒß kita tu ¶a ¶aj ku tatama ¶a ¶aj ku tatajna anikar~…æ…ôa ¶awaan, itida i mawmaƒßaj nu nijadu î~ °an atu nika r~…æam…ôr~…æan tu dumaan a tad…ômawan nu nijadu î~ °an makaar~…æa tu siwr~…æim a r~…æasubuan. sakaadiƒßan numita u mikadabu ku tatajnaan tu tatamaan. anu inai î~ °aj nu tatamaan a wawaan tan…ô≈ã mikadabu tu tatajnaan. . katuudaj nu tatamaan a a ¶awa nu r~…æumaan, sipakajda i tatamaan a mar~…æ…ôkakaaj ku a ¶awaw, mikikun sat uku sakakaaj a tatamaan, kir~…æur~…æ sat uku sabama mir~…æabu tida r~…æumaan, siwawa satu u sakakaaj a kakaan ku wama ƒßan, saba ƒßantu u biki tu ku sausi. nu tatusaaj a mar~…æ…ôkakaaj nu tatamaan ¶a ¶aj ku tatajnaan a a ¶awaw miƒßniaj ƒßina adiƒß kita. dumasa idaw ku ¶ar~…æ…ôkakaan nu tatamaan tu a ¶awawan atu ¶abaj mir~…æabutu kasia ¶awa. . ¶…ôn ¶u nikar~…æ…ôa ¶awaan amisawantan tu putun nu ida≈ãan atu r~…æar~…æabu nu r~…æumaan a mikiku≈ã, mar~…æ…ô ¶adaj ku wama ƒßan a ¶aaj kar~…æ…ôa ¶awaw, nu ¶ar~…æ…ôkakaan a ¶aaj tu kar~…æ…ôa ¶awaw. ¶ajsiw-war~…æ ¶aj miƒß ¶aan, midui tu ku si ¶…ôn itidaaj a dajƒßu tu ¶unƒßa-z…ônmin kunƒß…ôkuo a kiku≈ãan nu ƒßur~…æi ¶, saan ku ƒßur~…æi ¶ " r~…æawp…ôs…ôntu ku ¶a ¶aja nu jadaƒßaj a tatajnaan a a ¶awaw, ¶a ¶aja a tatamaan a a ¶awawan, nu mar~…æaa ¶awaaj tu a wajwajan, anu ¶aaj r~…æawp…ôsi nida ku tar~…æ…ôa ¶awaaan, ƒßidan tu sa. *****, ". kanki nu bina ¶adan**** ¶…ôn ¶u atu ¶unjun ƒßan ¶u idaw ku sasupaini nuƒß…ôni tu mat…ôn…ôsaj a r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan. sun ¶…ôn-kapu zitaj, t…ôn ¶aw atu tuƒßun mar~…æar~…æit…ômuƒß tu ¶…ônan sinin tankur~…æa pu≈ãka≈ãan na ¶i r~…æasa a dadan. nikudan satu sakaudip nu ¶…ônƒßan kapaƒßtu ku nikasasu≈ãaajan nu ƒß…ôni atu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan, ƒßan ¶u a taw ¶…ô, s…ô ¶uo, insua a nar~…æimaan tajdatu i ¶…ônti, ¶…ôn ¶u pasajda i ƒßaƒßti idaw tu ku jadaƒßaj nu ¶a ¶a ¶udadan. ¶…ôn ¶u mir~…æakuujd tu ¶…ôn ¶u nipidudu ¶an tu sapipajpaja a r~…æisinan, ni kuwanan a r~…æiwr~…æiw nu bina ¶adan a nijadu î~ °an mapar~…æar~…æit, jun ¶aw zitaj a mikikakaaj nu mumku bina ¶adan, mikikakaaj tu ¶in ¶aw a man ¶u, mikikaka tu r~…æi ¶…ôn nijadu î~ °an a nasi ¶u, midudu ¶ tu sapar~…æutat…ô≈ãaan a sinzaan, sakaudip, r~…æisin, r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan ¶aaj namin kar~…æa ¶ad ku nipaini tu sakatin…ô≈ã. . ¶…ôn ¶u atu ¶in ¶…ôn kawjun a m…ônpa bina ¶adan, r~…æupa bina ¶adan, sia…ôpa-z…ôn a bina ¶adan ƒßatidaajtu nu t…ôn…ôs mapur~…æu≈ã maudip, ¶aaj ka putun ku kar~…æ…ô ¶abaj nuƒß…ôni. ¶i …ôn…ôm s…ô ¶i dar~…æaj ¶…ôn-jin ¶ia ¶uo itidaaj a nir~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i m…ônuo a m…ônpa a bina ¶adan. ¶…ôn ¶u u sapikir~…æuk tu ¶…ônji a sur~…æit nu ¶…ônw…ôn, ar~…æa…ôn nu pu î~ °dan, si ¶in a tad…ômaw sipikir~…æuk nuƒß…ôni tu kamu. . itida i kan ¶in ¶un- d…ôn ¶…ôn kar~…æar~…æit…ômuƒßan a ¶…ônr~…æi sar~…æini≈ãan, idaw ku nikak…ôniƒßan a mar~…æar~…æidaj nu ¶…ôn ¶u a bina ¶adan, u ¶…ônji nami ku sakamu…ôn, itini i r~…æabu musakamuaj tu kamuan, maƒßida u ¶iaz…ôn-z…ôn, muja-z…ôn sa, ¶aaja kaw kakat…ôn…ô≈ãananaj a bina ¶ada, par~…æu ¶…ôn ¶u ƒßan namin nu ¶unƒßa-minkuo kunƒß…ôkuo kina bina ¶adan. .
S.FORM: == CencuËóèÊóè == Cencu tada sakaudip nuhein itida i Cincen buyuan, u Cenyi a kamu nu binacadan, saan tu kunuheni " puopa" Cenyi ýΩñýΩºýΩëýºãýΩîýºã, sumaden nu Wili misulit " bod pa, aasipen nu Cenyi P√∂ba. tadaangangan nika kenihan itida i Cunha-minkuo kunhekuo atu labutu nu kanatalan a Sicen, Cun, Cin, Kan, Din, kanatalay a tademaw makaala tu nemlisep a wangan ku tademaw, itida i Nipuoe, Intu', Pudan, Pacise-tan sa i liwliw nu Cincen buyuan a kanatalan idaw nikakenihan tu tademaw, duma satu idaw ku namaka Cunkuo kanatalan mabulaway nu Cencu atu iluc makaala tu tusep a wangan, u ihekalay a Cen-zen han. . pitu a seci, Suncen-kanpu palecaden tu Cincen buyuan, patideng tu Tulu-dikuo. kunyun caycay , caytu a seci, hamawsa malingatu ku Cencu a binacadan. Cencu nakamuan u Cenyi, milecad tu Cenwen. angangan nu kakawawan u sapahutin tu katala, sakayliwmah. Palutatengaan nuheni a lisin u mipaypaya, micidek ku sasinzaan nuheni. 7‰∏ñÁ¥Ä, . daduducan tu dikuc u Cencu a dikucan, u tengliw ku tatengaay. u tunuc ku kakanen, katalan atu sidi ku yadahay a nikanan, manamuh minanum tu suyuca, cinkuociw. papahutinan u dabek ku yadah, patiyamay han u nipatunduhan tu ba'tu ku luma'. pasayda han i tapukuwan ku tadem. pisiwgacuan u tada kanamuhan nu Cencu a demiadan. matenesay t uku lalangw nuheni, micidek ku balubaluan nu melitmelit, yadah ku nipaini nu taw, sasapayuen nu Cencu, kuyumi nu heni, lalalukiyawan, tanka, kimkimkiman nu tademaw nisangaan uyda ku picidekan. Sese, zekun nalimaan, papalawan caay kaw tatengaay a lalangawan nu laliwanan a nikilukan. . nananaman a sasalisinanÈ¢®‰øóÁøíÊÖ£ kakikunganÂ©öÂßª yadah ku wayway nu nipikikungan. Hanaadih kita tu cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna anikaleacawaan, itida i mawmahay nu niyadu'an atu nika lamelan tu dumaan a tademawan nu niyadu'an makaala tu siwlim a lasubuan. Sakaadihan numita u mikadabu ku tataynaan tu tatamaan. anu inai'ay nu tatamaan a wawaan taneng mikadabu tu tataynaan. . katuuday nu tatamaan a acawa nu lumaan, sipakayda i tatamaan a malekakaay ku acawaw, mikikun sat uku sakakaay a tatamaan, kilul sat uku sabama milabu tida lumaan, siwawa satu u sakakaay a kakaan ku wama han, saba hantu u biki tu ku sausi. nu tatusaay a malekakaay nu tatamaan cacay ku tataynaan a acawaw mihniay hina adih kita. Dumasa idaw ku calekakaan nu tatamaan tu acawawan atu cabay milabutu kasiacawa. . Cencu nikaleacawaan amisawantan tu putun nu idangan atu lalabu nu lumaan a mikikung, malecaday ku wama han acaay kaleacawaw, nu calekakaan acaay tu kaleacawaw. caysiw-walcay mihcaan, midui tu ku Sicen itidaay a dayhu tu Cunha-zenmin kunhekuo a kikungan nu hulic, saan ku hulic " lawpesentu ku cacaya nu yadahay a tataynaan a acawaw, cacaya a tatamaan a acawawan, nu malaacawaay tu a waywayan, anu caay lawpesi nida ku taleacawaaan, hidan tu sa. 1981Âπ¥, ". kanki nu binacadanÊ∞ëÊóèÈóú‰øÇ Cencu atu Cunyun hancu idaw ku sasupaini nuheni tu matenesay a lalangawan. Suncen-kapu zitay, Tencaw atu Tuhun malalitemuh tu Cenan Sinin Tankula pungkangan Naci Lasa a dadan. nikudan satu sakaudip nu Cenhan kapahtu ku nikasasungaayan nu heni atu lalangawan, Hancu a tawce, secuo, insua a nalimaan taydatu i Centi, Cencu pasayda i Hahti idaw tu ku yadahay nu cacacudadan. Cencu milakuuyd tu Cencu nipiduducan tu sapipaypaya a lisinan, ni kuwanan a liwliw nu binacadan a niyadu'an mapalalit, Yuncaw zitay a mikikakaay nu Mumku binacadan, mikikakaay tu Cincaw a Mancu, mikikaka tu Licen niyadu'an a Nasicu, miduduc tu sapalutatengaan a sinzaan, sakaudip, lisin, lalangawan caay namin kalacad ku nipaini tu sakatineng. . Cencu atu Cincen kawyun a Menpa binacadan, Lupa binacadan, Siaepa-zen a binacadan hatidaaytu nu tenes mapulung maudip, caay ka putun ku kalecabay nuheni. ci enem se ci Dalaycen-yinciacuo itidaay a nilecuhan i Menuo a Menpa a binacadan. Cencu u sapikiluk tu Cenyi a sulit nu Cenwen, alaen nu Pu'dan, Sicin a tademaw sipikiluk nuheni tu kamu. . itida i Kancincun- dencen kalalitemuhan a Cenli saliningan, idaw ku nikakenihan a malaliday nu Cencu a binacadan, u Cenyi nami ku sakamuen, itini i labu musakamuay tu kamuan, mahida u Ciazen-zen, Muya-zen sa, caaya kaw kakatenengananay a binacada, palu Cencu han namin nu Cunha-minkuo kunhekuo kina binacadan. .

pisiwga ¶uan u tada kanamuƒßan nu ¶…ôn ¶u a d…ômiadan. mat…ôn…ôsaj t uku r~…æar~…æa≈ãw nuƒß…ôni, mi ¶id…ôk ku bar~…æubar~…æuan nu m…ôr~…æitm…ôr~…æit, jadaƒß ku nipaini nu taw, sasapaju…ôn nu ¶…ôn ¶u, kujumi nu ƒß…ôni, r~…æar~…æar~…æukijawan, tanka, kimkimkiman nu tad…ômaw nisa≈ãaan ujda ku pi ¶id…ôkan. s…ôs…ô, z…ôkun nar~…æimaan, papar~…æawan ¶aaj kaw tat…ô≈ãaaj a r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan nu r~…æar~…æiwanan a nikir~…æukan. . nananaman a sasar~…æisinan**** kakiku≈ãan** jadaƒß ku wajwaj nu nipikiku≈ãan. ƒßanaadiƒß kita tu ¶a ¶aj ku tatama ¶a ¶aj ku tatajna anikar~…æ…ôa ¶awaan, itida i mawmaƒßaj nu nijadu î~ °an atu nika r~…æam…ôr~…æan tu dumaan a tad…ômawan nu nijadu î~ °an makaar~…æa tu siwr~…æim a r~…æasubuan. sakaadiƒßan numita u mikadabu ku tatajnaan tu tatamaan. anu inai î~ °aj nu tatamaan a wawaan tan…ô≈ã mikadabu tu tatajnaan. . katuudaj nu tatamaan a a ¶awa nu r~…æumaan, sipakajda i tatamaan a mar~…æ…ôkakaaj ku a ¶awaw, mikikun sat uku sakakaaj a tatamaan, kir~…æur~…æ sat uku sabama mir~…æabu tida r~…æumaan, siwawa satu u sakakaaj a kakaan ku wama ƒßan, saba ƒßantu u biki tu ku sausi. nu tatusaaj a mar~…æ…ôkakaaj nu tatamaan ¶a ¶aj ku tatajnaan a a ¶awaw miƒßniaj ¶u a taw ¶…ô, s…ô ¶uo, insua a nar~…æimaan tajdatu i ¶…ônti, ¶…ôn ¶u pasajda i ƒßaƒßti idaw tu ku jadaƒßaj nu ¶a ¶a ¶udadan. ¶…ôn ¶u mir~…æakuujd tu ¶…ôn ¶u nipidudu ¶an tu sapipajpaja a r~…æisinan,
